mapper.insert: insert into members(m_id, m_pw, m_name, m_addr, m_email, m_phone) values(#{m_id}, #{m_pw}, #{m_name}, #{m_addr}, #{m_email}, #{m_phone})
mapper.update: update members set m_name = #{m_name}, m_email = #{m_email}, m_phone = #{m_phone}, m_addr = #{m_addr}, m_addr2 = #{m_addr2} where m_id = #{m_id} and m_active = 0
mapper.select: select * from members where m_active = 0 and m_id=#{m_id}
select count(*) from members where m_id = #{m_id} and m_active = 0
select * from members where m_active = 0 and m_email = #{m_email}
mapper.insert: insert into members(m_id, m_name, m_email, m_phone, sns_provider, sns_email_naver, sns_email_kakao) values(#{m_id}, #{m_name}, #{m_email}, #{m_phone}, #{sns_provider}, #{sns_email_naver}, #{sns_email_kakao})
mapper.update: update members set sns_provider = #{sns_provider}, sns_email_naver = COALESCE(#{sns_email_naver}, sns_email_naver), sns_email_kakao = COALESCE(#{sns_email_kakao}, sns_email_kakao) where m_id = #{m_id} and m_active = 0
